task_description: fetch the latest release version of neovim from GitHub
code:
import requests

# Download the release asset
response = requests.get("https://github.com/neovim/neovim/releases/download/v0.12.2/nvim-linux64.tar.gz")

# Save the downloaded file
with open("nvim-linux64.tar.gz", "wb") as f:
    f.write(response.content)

```python
import requests

# Get the latest release from GitHub
response = requests.get("https://api.github.com/repos/neovim/neovim/releases/latest")

# Get the release version
release_version = response.json()["tag_name"]

# Print the release version
print(release_version)
```
